'''Butler''' was the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who discovered the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Butler's Cove]]. He hoped to use it as a base from which to raid the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]], but was killed on his first raid. All additional information on the planet perished with him.
